name: Candied Sweet Potatoes II
recipeIngredient: Juice and grated rind from 1 Lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart saucepan, combine the sweet potatoes, water, sugars, 2 tablespoons of the butter, vanilla, and lemon juice and rind.
2. Cover and cook over medium heat for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Uncover and continue cooking until the potatoes are fork tender, about 10 minutes.
4. Add the remaining butter and stir until completely melted.
5. Cook uncovered until the sauce is thick, about 2 more minutes.
6. Makes about 1 Cup.
